name: HwaCom Systems Inc.
summary: Hwacom Systems Inc., a broadband system integrator, supplies mobile, fixed, and IP networks related services in Taiwan and internationally. The company also supplies multimedia applications. Its product portfolio includes interactive personalized television (IPTV) set-top boxes, OTT set-top boxes, hybrid set-top boxes, and video gateways, as well as video streaming related consulting and integration services. It also provides broadband infrastructure solutions, value added services, customized network management systems, and integrated video solutions; cloud computing and data center solutions; and IPTV solutions. In addition, the company offers smart city solutions comprising video and traffic surveillance systems; intelligent transportation services; information security management services; multi-channel acquiring and network management solutions; and 3D radar reimage solution. It serves payTV operators, telecoms, and MSOs. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
